title: Raw-Friendly Midnight Syrian Daikon Salad
description: A refreshing and crunchy salad that captures the essence of midnight cravings, featuring daikon and a mother sauce base, all in a raw-friendly format.
instructions: Grate the daikon radish and set aside in a large bowl.
Thinly slice the cucumber and add it to the bowl with the daikon.
Finely chop the red onion and parsley, then add to the bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, apple cider vinegar, garlic ginger paste, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the dressing over the daikon and cucumber mixture, and toss to combine.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Enjoy the refreshing flavors of this Raw-Friendly Midnight Syrian Daikon Salad!
